title: llm-schema Event Envelope
description: Canonical JSON Schema for the llm-schema v1.0 Event envelope.  Every event emitted by a tool in the LLM Developer Toolkit must validate against this schema.

event_id.description: Universally unique ULID identifier for this event (26 uppercase base-32 characters).

timestamp.description: UTC ISO-8601 timestamp when the event was emitted.

payload.description: Tool-specific event data.  Must contain at least one property.

trace_id.description: OpenTelemetry trace ID — exactly 32 lowercase hexadecimal characters.

span_id.description: OpenTelemetry span ID — exactly 16 lowercase hexadecimal characters.

parent_span_id.description: Parent span ID — exactly 16 lowercase hexadecimal characters.

actor_id.description: User or service-account identifier that triggered the event.

session_id.description: Session identifier grouping a series of related events.

tags.description: Arbitrary string key→value metadata attached to the event.

checksum.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the canonical payload (set by sign()).

signature.description: HMAC-SHA256 hex signature covering the event chain (set by sign()).

prev_id.description: ULID of the previous event in an audit chain (set by sign()).
